info.name: Portfolio Suite API
info.description:
# Portfolio Suite API

## Overview
Complete API documentation for the Portfolio Suite backend. All endpoints are grouped by domain.

## Authentication
Protected routes require a Bearer token in the `Authorization` header.
Run **Auth > Login** first — the test script saves the token to `{{token}}` automatically.

## Base URL
`{{base_url}}` defaults to `http://localhost:3001`

## Domains
- **Auth** — Login and registration
- **Profile** — Profile and about section management
- **Projects** — Portfolio projects (public + admin)
- **Career** — Work experience entries
- **Stacks** — Technology stacks
- **Categories** — Stack categories
- **Domains** — Business domains
- **Services** — Offered services
- **Contacts** — Contact information and contact form
- **Education** — Education entries
- **Settings** — Application settings and SMTP
- **Stats** — Public statistics
- **Assets** — File upload and management
- **User** — User profile endpoints
- **About** — About page data

request.description:
## Login

Authenticates the user and returns a JWT token.

### Validations
- `email` (string, required): Valid email address
- `password` (string, required): User password

### Rules
- Credentials must be valid
- Returns a signed JWT token
- Token must be sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on protected routes

### Test Script
Automatically saves the returned `token` to the `{{token}}` environment variable.

### Errors
- 400: Missing or invalid fields
- 401: Invalid credentials

## Register

Creates a new user account. **Available in development environment only.**

### Validations
- `displayName` (string, required): User display name
- `email` (string, required): Valid email address (must be unique)
- `password` (string, required): Password

### Errors
- 400: Missing fields or email already taken
- 403: Not available in production

## Get Profile

Returns the authenticated user's profile data including bio, title, highlights, and social links.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Errors
- 401: Missing or invalid token

response.name: 200 Success
response.body:
{
  "id": "cluid1",
  "displayName": "Lucas Biason",
  "title": "Senior Backend Developer",
  "bio": "Passionate about clean code and scalable systems.",
  "email": "admin@portfolio.com"
}

body.raw:
{
  "displayName": "Lucas Biason",
  "title": "Senior Backend Developer",
  "bio": "Passionate about clean code and scalable systems.",
  "highlights": ["Python", "FastAPI", "Node.js"],
  "avatarUrl": "https://example.com/avatar.jpg",
  "contactText": "Feel free to reach out!"
}

request.description:
## Update Profile

Updates the authenticated user's profile.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `displayName` (string): Display name
- `title` (string): Professional title
- `bio` (string): Short bio
- `highlights` (array of strings): Key skills or highlights
- `avatarUrl` (string): URL to avatar image
- `contactText` (string): Contact section introductory text

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized

## Get About Section

Returns the about section content for the authenticated user.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized

## List Projects (Public)

Returns all published projects. No authentication required.

### Query Parameters
- `featured` (boolean, optional): Filter to show only featured projects

## List Projects (Admin)

Returns all projects with full data for admin management.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Query Parameters
- `search` (string, optional): Search in title and description
- `categories` (string, optional): Comma-separated category IDs
- `stacks` (string, optional): Comma-separated stack IDs
- `page` (number, optional): Page number, default 1
- `pageSize` (number, optional): Items per page, default 10
- `sortBy` (string, optional): Field to sort by — `order`, `title`, `createdAt`
- `sortDir` (string, optional): `asc` or `desc`

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Portfolio Suite",
  "slug": "portfolio-suite",
  "description": "Full-stack portfolio management system.",
  "longDescription": "A complete solution for managing portfolio content including projects, career, stacks, and more.",
  "repoUrl": "https://github.com/user/portfolio-suite",
  "liveUrl": "https://portfolio.example.com",
  "thumbnailUrl": "https://example.com/thumb.jpg",
  "featured": true,
  "stackIds": ["cluid-stack1", "cluid-stack2"],
  "categoryIds": ["cluid-cat1"],
  "order": 1
}

request.description:
## Create Project

Creates a new portfolio project.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `title` (string, required): Project title
- `slug` (string, required): URL slug (unique)
- `description` (string, required): Short description
- `longDescription` (string, optional): Full description
- `repoUrl` (string, optional): Repository URL
- `liveUrl` (string, optional): Live demo URL
- `thumbnailUrl` (string, optional): Thumbnail image URL
- `featured` (boolean, optional): Mark as featured
- `stackIds` (array, optional): Array of stack IDs
- `categoryIds` (array, optional): Array of category IDs
- `order` (number, optional): Display order

### Errors
- 400: Validation error or slug already taken
- 401: Unauthorized

## Update Project

Updates an existing project by ID.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Project ID

### Body
Same fields as Create Project — all optional.

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Project not found

## Delete Project

Permanently deletes a project by ID.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Project ID

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Project not found

## List Career (Public)

Returns published career/work experience entries. No authentication required.

## List Career (Admin)

Returns all career entries with full data for admin management.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Query Parameters
- `search` (string, optional): Search in company name or role
- `domains` (string, optional): Comma-separated domain IDs
- `contractType` (string, optional): `CLT`, `PJ`, or `FREELANCE`
- `page` (number, optional): Page number
- `pageSize` (number, optional): Items per page
- `sortBy` / `sortDir`: Sort configuration

body.raw:
{
  "company": "Acme Corp",
  "role": "Senior Backend Developer",
  "contractType": "CLT",
  "startDate": "2022-01-01",
  "endDate": null,
  "summary": "Led backend architecture for payment systems.",
  "actions": [
    "Redesigned payment service reducing latency by 40%",
    "Migrated legacy monolith to microservices"
  ],
  "projectTypes": ["Payment Systems", "APIs"],
  "stackIds": ["cluid-stack1"],
  "domainIds": ["cluid-domain1"],
  "order": 1
}

request.description:
## Create Career Entry

Creates a new work experience entry.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `company` (string, required): Company name
- `role` (string, required): Job title / role
- `contractType` (string, required): `CLT`, `PJ`, or `FREELANCE`
- `startDate` (string, required): ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `endDate` (string, optional): ISO date or null if current
- `summary` (string, required): Short summary of responsibilities
- `actions` (array of strings, optional): Key achievements or actions
- `projectTypes` (array of strings, optional): Types of projects worked on
- `stackIds` (array of strings, optional): Related stack IDs
- `domainIds` (array of strings, optional): Related domain IDs
- `order` (number, optional): Display order

### Choices: contractType
- `CLT`: Brazilian employment contract
- `PJ`: Legal entity / contractor
- `FREELANCE`: Freelance engagement

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized

## Update Career Entry

Updates an existing career entry by ID.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Career entry ID

### Body
Same fields as Create — all optional.

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Entry not found

## Delete Career Entry

Permanently deletes a career entry.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Career entry ID

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Entry not found

## List Stacks (Public)

Returns all technology stacks. No authentication required.

query.description: Proficiency level: BASIC | INTERMEDIATE | ADVANCED | EXPERT

request.description:
## List Stacks (Admin)

Returns all stacks with full data for admin management.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Query Parameters
- `search` (string, optional): Search by name
- `category` (string, optional): Category ID
- `level` (string, optional): `BASIC`, `INTERMEDIATE`, `ADVANCED`, `EXPERT`
- `page`, `pageSize`, `sortBy`, `sortDir`: Pagination and sorting

body.raw:
{
  "name": "FastAPI",
  "categoryId": "cluid-cat1",
  "startYear": 2021,
  "endYear": null,
  "level": "EXPERT",
  "icon": "fastapi",
  "profProjects": ["Portfolio Suite", "ExpenseIQ"],
  "personalProjects": ["CLI Tool"],
  "solutions": ["REST APIs", "Microservices"],
  "patterns": ["Repository Pattern", "Clean Architecture"],
  "order": 1
}

request.description:
## Create Stack

Creates a new technology stack entry.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `name` (string, required): Stack name (unique)
- `categoryId` (string, required): Parent category ID
- `startYear` (number, required): Year started using
- `endYear` (number, optional): Year stopped using (null if still active)
- `level` (string, required): Proficiency level
- `icon` (string, optional): Icon identifier or URL
- `profProjects` (array of strings, optional): Professional project names
- `personalProjects` (array of strings, optional): Personal project names
- `solutions` (array of strings, optional): Solutions/areas of application
- `patterns` (array of strings, optional): Design patterns used
- `order` (number, optional): Display order

### Choices: level
- `BASIC`
- `INTERMEDIATE`
- `ADVANCED`
- `EXPERT`

### Errors
- 400: Validation error or name already taken
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Category not found

## Update Stack

Updates an existing stack by ID.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Stack ID

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Stack not found

## Delete Stack

Permanently deletes a stack by ID.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Stack not found

## List Categories (Public)

Returns all stack categories. No authentication required.

## Create Category

Creates a new stack category.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `name` (string, required): Category name
- `slug` (string, required): URL slug (unique)
- `icon` (string, optional): Icon identifier
- `color` (string, optional): Hex color code
- `order` (number, optional): Display order

### Errors
- 400: Validation error or slug already taken
- 401: Unauthorized

## Update Category

Updates an existing category.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Category ID

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Category not found

## Delete Category

Permanently deletes a category. Fails if stacks are still associated.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Category not found
- 409: Category has associated stacks

## List Domains (Public)

Returns all business domains. No authentication required.

## Create Domain

Creates a new business domain.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `name` (string, required): Domain name
- `slug` (string, optional): URL slug
- `description` (string, optional): Description

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized

## Update Domain

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Domain ID

## Delete Domain

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Domain ID

## List Services (Public)

Returns all published offered services. No authentication required.

## List Services (Admin)

Returns all services including unpublished ones.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Backend Development",
  "description": "Build scalable REST APIs and microservices.",
  "icon": "server",
  "published": true,
  "order": 1
}

request.description:
## Create Service

Creates a new offered service.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `title` (string, required): Service title
- `description` (string, required): Service description
- `icon` (string, optional): Icon identifier
- `published` (boolean, optional): Visibility on public site
- `order` (number, optional): Display order

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized

## Update Service

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Service ID

## Delete Service

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Service ID

## List Contact Info (Public)

Returns all published contact cards (email, phone, social links). No authentication required.

## List Contact Info (Admin)

Returns all contact entries including unpublished ones.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

## Send Contact Message (Public)

Sends a contact form email via configured SMTP. No authentication required.

### Body Fields
- `name` (string, required): Sender name
- `email` (string, required): Sender email address
- `message` (string, required): Message content

### Rules
- Email is sent to the configured portfolio owner address
- SMTP must be configured in Settings

### Errors
- 400: Missing or invalid fields
- 500: SMTP delivery failure

## Create Contact Info

Creates a new contact info card.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `label` (string, required): Display label (e.g., Email, LinkedIn)
- `value` (string, required): Display value
- `icon` (string, optional): Icon identifier
- `href` (string, optional): Link URL
- `published` (boolean, optional): Visibility
- `order` (number, optional): Display order

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized

## Update Contact Info

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Contact info entry ID

## Delete Contact Info

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Contact info entry ID

## List Education (Public)

Returns all education entries. No authentication required.

body.raw:
{
  "institution": "FIAP",
  "degree": "MBA em Inteligência Artificial",
  "fieldOfStudy": "Artificial Intelligence",
  "startYear": 2023,
  "endYear": 2025,
  "description": "Focus on machine learning and AI applications.",
  "order": 1
}

request.description:
## Create Education

Creates a new education entry.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `institution` (string, required): Institution name
- `degree` (string, required): Degree or certification name
- `fieldOfStudy` (string, optional): Field of study
- `startYear` (number, required): Year started
- `endYear` (number, optional): Year completed (null if in progress)
- `description` (string, optional): Additional description
- `order` (number, optional): Display order

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized

## Update Education

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Education entry ID

## Delete Education

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `id` (string, required): Education entry ID

## Get Public Settings

Returns non-sensitive public application settings (site title, meta, theme). No authentication required.

## Get All Settings

Returns all application settings including SMTP configuration.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized

## Update Settings

Updates application settings including SMTP configuration.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `siteTitle` (string, optional): Site title for meta/SEO
- `metaDescription` (string, optional): Meta description
- `primaryColor` (string, optional): Primary brand color (hex)
- `smtpHost` (string, optional): SMTP server hostname
- `smtpPort` (number, optional): SMTP port (25, 465, 587)
- `smtpUser` (string, optional): SMTP authentication username
- `smtpPassword` (string, optional): SMTP authentication password
- `smtpFrom` (string, optional): From email address
- `contactEmail` (string, optional): Destination for contact form messages

### Errors
- 400: Validation error
- 401: Unauthorized

## Test Email (SMTP)

Sends a test email using the currently configured SMTP settings.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body Fields
- `to` (string, required): Destination email address for the test

### Rules
- SMTP must be configured before testing
- Sends a simple test message to verify configuration

### Errors
- 400: Missing `to` field
- 401: Unauthorized
- 500: SMTP connection or delivery failure

## Get Public Stats

Returns aggregated public statistics about the portfolio (project count, years of experience, stacks count, etc.). No authentication required.

formdata.description: Tag identifier for the asset (string, required)

request.description:
## Upload Asset

Uploads a file and associates it with a tag for later retrieval.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Body (multipart/form-data)
- `file` (file, required): The file to upload
- `tag` (string, required): Unique tag identifier (used to retrieve/delete asset)
- `description` (string, optional): Description of the asset

### Rules
- If a tag already exists, the previous file may be replaced
- Supported formats depend on server configuration

### Errors
- 400: Missing file or tag
- 401: Unauthorized
- 413: File too large

## List Assets

Returns all uploaded assets.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

## Get Asset by Tag

Returns asset metadata for a given tag.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `tag` (string, required): The tag used when uploading

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Asset not found

## Delete Asset

Deletes an asset and its associated file by tag.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Path Parameters
- `tag` (string, required): The tag used when uploading

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized
- 404: Asset not found

## Get About (Public)

Returns the complete about page data for the public frontend. No authentication required.

Includes bio text, highlights, avatar, and supporting content.

response.name: 200 Success

request.description:
## Get About Me (Admin)

Returns the full about data for the authenticated admin user, including editable fields.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized

## Get Public User Profile

Returns the default portfolio user's public profile data. Used by the frontend to render the homepage.

The default user is determined by `PORTFOLIO_DEFAULT_EMAIL` environment variable.

No authentication required.

response.name: 200 Success
response.body:
{
  "displayName": "Lucas Biason",
  "title": "Senior Backend Developer",
  "bio": "Passionate about clean code and scalable systems.",
  "avatarUrl": "https://example.com/uploads/avatar.jpg",
  "projects": [],
  "career": [],
  "stacks": [],
  "services": []
}

request.description:
## Get Auth User Profile

Returns the full profile of the currently authenticated user, including private fields.

### Auth
Requires Bearer token.

### Errors
- 401: Unauthorized
